name: Solaris Energy Infrastructure, Inc.
business: Solaris Energy Infrastructure provides modular and scalable equipment-based solutions for power generation, control and distribution, and the management of raw materials in oil and natural gas well completions. The company serves U.S. end markets including data center, energy, and other commercial and industrial sectors. It operates through two segments: Solaris Power Solutions (power generation, control, and distribution) and Solaris Logistics Solutions (equipment for oil and gas well completions).

exposures.sentence: Our offerings support data center, energy, and other commercial and industrial sector customers by providing flexible, on-demand power infrastructure, including power control and distribution capabilities.

During the first quarter of 2026, we entered into a rental agreement with an affiliate of an investment grade, global technology company and industry leader in the evolving artificial intelligence computer space to provide over 500 megawatts of power generation equipment to support the customer’s power demand for artificial intelligence computing needs at its data center.
This segment designs and manufactures specialized equipment that enables the efficient management of raw materials used in the completion of oil and natural gas wells.

catalysts.event: Revenue commencement under 900 MW data center contract
catalysts.sentence: Revenue under this arrangement is expected to commence in 2026.

catalysts.event: Revenue commencement under 500 MW AI computing rental agreement
catalysts.sentence: The agreement’s initial term of ten years is expected to commence in 2027.

catalysts.event: Delivery of additional 500 MW power generation equipment in tranches from mid-2027 through early 2028
catalysts.sentence: In November 2025, the Company ordered an additional approximately 500 megawatts of power generation equipment which it expects to be delivered in tranches from mid-2027 through early 2028.

catalysts.event: Drawdown of remaining Stateline term loan capacity
catalysts.sentence: The remaining capacity of $332.5 million is expected to be drawn during the remainder of 2026, depending on the timing of progress payments and equipment deliveries.
